data.title: Arista Networks Unusual Options Activity For October 10
Spotlight on Honeywell Intl: Analyzing the Surge in Options Activity
Gene Sequencing Tech Provider 10x Genomics' Q3 Sales Fall Short On Expectations, But CEO Sees Opportunity Ahead
data.description: 10x Genomics reported Q3 2024 revenue of $151.7 million, down 1% from last year. Instruments revenue dropped 46%, while consumables grew 10%. CEO Serge Saxonov acknowledged the challenges faced but remains confident in future growth.

data.title: Michael Jordan Buys A New Private Jet That Is Also Owned By Tech Billionaires Elon Musk And Jeff Bezos
data.description: Basketball player Michael Jordan is rumored to have taken delivery of a new Gulfstream G650ER, a popular business jet among the rich and famous.
